tools.name: scene_get_scene_list
tools.description: Get all scenes in the project

tools.name: scene_get_scene_hierarchy
tools.description: Get the complete hierarchy of current scene

tools.name: node_create_node
tools.description: Create a new node in the scene. Supports creating empty nodes, nodes with components, or instantiating from assets (prefabs, etc.). IMPORTANT: You should always provide parentUuid to specify where to create the node.

tools.name: node_find_node_by_name
tools.description: Find first node by exact name

tools.name: node_get_all_nodes
tools.description: Get all nodes in the scene with their UUIDs

tools.name: node_set_node_property
tools.description: Set node property value (prefer using set_node_transform for active/layer/mobility/position/rotation/scale)

tools.name: node_set_node_transform
tools.description: Set node transform properties (position, rotation, scale) with unified interface. Automatically handles 2D/3D node differences.

tools.name: node_detect_node_type
tools.description: Detect if a node is 2D or 3D based on its components and properties

tools.name: component_add_component
tools.description: Add a component to a specific node. IMPORTANT: You must provide the nodeUuid parameter to specify which node to add the component to.

tools.name: component_remove_component
tools.description: Remove a component from a node. componentType must be the component's classId (cid, i.e. the type field from getComponents), not the script name or class name. Use getComponents to get the correct cid.

tools.name: component_get_components
tools.description: Get all components of a node

tools.name: component_set_component_property
tools.description: Set component property values for UI components or custom script components. Supports setting properties of built-in UI components (e.g., cc.Label, cc.Sprite) and custom script components. Note: For node basic properties (name, active, layer, etc.), use set_node_property. For node transform properties (position, rotation, scale, etc.), use set_node_transform.

tools.name: component_attach_script
tools.description: Attach a script component to a node

tools.name: component_get_available_components
tools.description: Get list of available component types

tools.name: prefab_get_prefab_list
tools.description: Get all prefabs in the project

tools.name: prefab_instantiate_prefab
tools.description: Instantiate a prefab in the scene

tools.name: prefab_create_prefab
tools.description: Create a prefab from a node with all children and components

tools.name: prefab_restore_prefab_node
tools.description: Restore prefab node using prefab asset (built-in undo record)

tools.name: project_run_project
tools.description: Run the project in preview mode

tools.name: project_get_build_settings
tools.description: Get build settings - shows current limitations

tools.name: project_open_build_panel
tools.description: Open the build panel in the editor

tools.name: project_check_builder_status
tools.description: Check if builder worker is ready

tools.name: project_create_asset
tools.description: Create a new asset file or folder

tools.name: project_copy_asset
tools.description: Copy an asset to another location

tools.name: project_move_asset
tools.description: Move an asset to another location

tools.name: project_find_asset_by_name
tools.description: Find assets by name (supports partial matching and multiple results)

tools.name: project_get_asset_details
tools.description: Get detailed asset information including spriteFrame sub-assets

tools.name: debug_get_node_tree
tools.description: Get detailed node tree for debugging

tools.name: debug_get_project_logs
tools.description: Get project logs from temp/logs/project.log file

tools.name: debug_get_log_file_info
tools.description: Get information about the project log file

tools.name: debug_search_project_logs
tools.description: Search for specific patterns or errors in project logs

tools.name: server_check_server_connectivity
tools.description: Check server connectivity and network status

tools.name: broadcast_listen_broadcast
tools.description: Start listening for specific broadcast messages

tools.name: broadcast_stop_listening
tools.description: Stop listening for specific broadcast messages

tools.name: broadcast_get_active_listeners
tools.description: Get list of active broadcast listeners

tools.name: sceneAdvanced_reset_node_property
tools.description: Reset node property to default value

tools.name: sceneAdvanced_remove_array_element
tools.description: Remove array element at specific index

tools.name: sceneAdvanced_copy_node
tools.description: Copy node for later paste operation

tools.name: sceneAdvanced_reset_node_transform
tools.description: Reset node position, rotation and scale

tools.name: sceneAdvanced_query_scene_dirty
tools.description: Check if scene has unsaved changes

tools.name: sceneAdvanced_query_nodes_by_asset_uuid
tools.description: Find nodes that use specific asset UUID

tools.name: sceneView_align_camera_with_view
tools.description: Apply scene camera position and angle to selected node

tools.name: sceneView_align_view_with_node
tools.description: Apply selected node position and angle to current view

tools.name: sceneView_reset_scene_view
tools.description: Reset scene view to default settings

tools.name: referenceImage_set_reference_image_data
tools.description: Set reference image transform and display properties

tools.name: assetAdvanced_generate_available_url
tools.description: Generate an available URL based on input URL

tools.name: assetAdvanced_query_asset_db_ready
tools.description: Check if asset database is ready

tools.name: assetAdvanced_validate_asset_references
tools.description: Validate asset references and find broken links

tools.name: validation_validate_json_params
tools.description: Validate and fix JSON parameters before sending to other tools

tools.name: validation_safe_string_value
tools.description: Create a safe string value that won't cause JSON parsing issues

tools.name: validation_format_mcp_request
tools.description: Format a complete MCP request with proper JSON escaping
